form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (30.45) when sixth over 525m at this track in a Mix 3/4. Goes well out of this box with a win and four minors. Looks one of the chances.

form.formComment: Was a dominant winner after running them ragged recording back-to-back wins at Sandown over 515m (29.43). Has the ability and should feature again.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th in a Special conditions H on April 10 over 520m at Geelong behind Paw Matic beaten 4.5 lengths (30.20). Yet to be beaten in two starts out of this draw. Sure to go well.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Sandown over 595m. Last start finished 7th on April 4 over 600m at this track behind Warm Cockles beaten 9 lengths (35.32) in a Grade 4/5. Comes through a good form race. Looks a top chance.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when second (30.27) over 525m at this track. Boxed out wide and will need a little luck to feature.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 3 lengths over 525m at this track in a handy (30.11), beating Nova Owen. Can make it two on the bounce.
